arts.ttl: ‘I feel very lucky’ - Gavi speaks out after making Barca comeback
arts.sum: Watching the team from the outside is very hard and you have to enjoy every moment and value things. Barcelona midfielder Gavi could not hide his delight after making his long-awaited comeback from injury against Sevilla .

arts.ttl: Barcelona star Gavi returns after 11-month absence
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi came off the bench in the second half of his team's 5-1 win over Sevilla on Sunday.to make his return to action nearly a year after a serious knee injury.

arts.ttl: Barcelona, Liverpool receive major boost Jonathan David pursuit as striker contract decision
arts.sum: European giants Barcelona and Liverpool reportedly receive a boost in their bid to sign Lille striker Jonathan David in 2025.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick offers double positive Barcelona fitness update
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick has delivered good news on the fitness of Frenkie de Jong and Eric Garcia. La Blaugrana roared back into action following the October international break with a dominant 5-1 La Liga home win against Sevilla. As the goals flew in Catalonia, Flick’s charges extended their lead at the top of the […] The post Hansi Flick offers double positive Barcelona fitness update appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Lewandowski, Torre net braces in Barça 5-1 win
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski and substitute Pablo Torre each scored twice to help leaders Barcelona thrash visitors Sevilla 5-1 in LaLiga on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star admits his position was changed at last-minute vs Sevilla
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pedri has revealed that he was forced into a last-minute positional change, for the club’s latest outing. Barca of course marked their return to action a short time…

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend sends message to Gavi after long-awaited return
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Sergio Busquets has on Sunday evening sent a message of support the way of current Blaugrana youngster Gavi. This, of course, comes after Gavi marked his long-awaited…

arts.ttl: How Lamine Yamal matched Lionel Messi in Barcelona 3-0 Sevilla
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal on Sunday night joined club legend Lionel Messi in an altogether noteworthy category. This came owing to his exploits in Barcelona’s La Liga downing of Sevilla.…

arts.ttl: Photo: Returning Barcelona star Gavi receives captain’s armband from Pedri on return
arts.sum: The Barcelona coaching staff made sure to afford midfielder Gavi a moment to remember, upon his long-awaited return to the pitch this evening. The name of youngster Gavi has of…

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski equals Lionel Messi benchmark in Barcelona’s win over Sevilla
